name: list_customers
description: Retrieve a paginated list of customers from the Shopify store. Supports searching by name or email and filtering by creation date. Returns customer profiles with contact details, order counts, and total spend.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of customers to return (max 250, default 50).

parameters.name: since_id
parameters.description: Return only customers after the specified ID for pagination.

parameters.name: created_at_min
parameters.description: Show customers created after this date (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: created_at_max
parameters.description: Show customers created before this date (ISO 8601 format).
